description: Polish existing apps with meaningful micro-features that strengthen existing functionality. Add cross-app integration between the 13 existing apps. Enhance the existing packages with production-quality improvements rather than adding new apps.
steps: Add cross-app notification integration to packages/notifications - unified notification dispatch from any app (quantchat, quantmail, quantmeet, etc) with priority routing and delivery tracking
Enhance packages/search with cross-app search federation - allow searching across chat messages, emails, docs, drive files, calendar events from a single query
Add missing test coverage for packages/security - currently has fake crypto, add proper validation tests
Improve packages/realtime with connection health monitoring, reconnection strategy, and message delivery guarantees
Run full typecheck and test suite to confirm everything passes
acceptance_criteria: Cross-app notification dispatch works with priority and tracking
Unified search federation queries multiple content sources
All existing tests continue to pass
Build (typecheck) passes clean with zero errors
verification: Run: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx tsc --noEmit (zero errors)
Run: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx vitest run (all tests pass)
